prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约1905→1606→747→518→433名，呈持续大幅前移趋势，近4年累计前移约1472名；2025年基准位次约433名，已处于极高位区间；2021–2025年物理类招生计划分别为47→45→31→22→17人，持续缩招；2026年计划13人，较2025年再缩招4人（约-23.5%），缩招幅度较大，进一步加剧竞争。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: C9联盟成员、985/211/双一流；软科中国大学主榜排名2021年第11→2022年第13→2023年第13→2024年第16→2025年第14→2026年第12名，近年稳定在Top20，2026年排名升至近年最高；2026年声誉评价中性/混合，无重大负面舆情；抖音综合热度总排名第10（高热），短视频曝光量大，反映报考关注度较高；2024年曾出现投档线异常信号（考生反映与招生宣传不足有关），但2025年位次继续前移，异常影响已消化；第五轮学科评估A类学科共17个（A+：力学、机械工程、材料科学与工程、环境科学与工程；A：仪器科学与技术、土木工程、控制科学与工程、数学、电气工程、管理科学与工程、计算机科学与技术、软件工程；A-：信息与通信工程、光学工程、动力工程及工程热物理、建筑学、航空宇航科学与技术），工科实力顶尖，对考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等哈工大优势专业方向社会热度持续偏高；重庆市2026年普通高考总人数约209,000人，物理类按近年占比约65.5%估算约136,895人，较2025年物理类139,478人略有减少；哈尔滨工业大学位于黑龙江省，属跨省招生；重庆市非该校本地生源省份，无本地倾斜因素；该校在重庆物理类招生计划持续缩减，2026年仅13人，属小规模招生。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移趋势、2026年招生计划进一步缩招约23.5%、学校软科排名升至第12名且声誉稳定、抖音高热关注度等因素，预计2026年竞争进一步加剧，位次将继续前移。，预测最低位次约372名，区间322–422名。

- 工科试验班（自主智能系统院士特色班）
- 工科试验班（港大优学班）。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约372名，区间322–422名。位次在区间内建议以二档未来技术拔尖班为主攻方向，一档尖班/院士特色班可冲刺；位次明显优于区间下限（<322名）可重点冲一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（>422名）建议以三档深圳校区班型保底。哈工大2026年物理类仅招13人，竞争极为激烈，建议考生结合自身位次精准填报。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 1905 → 1606 → 747 → 518 → 433, showing a continuous and significant upward trend, with a cumulative advance of about 1472 positions over the past 4 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 433, already in a very high range; from 2021 to 2025, the enrollment plans for Physics Category were 47 → 45 → 31 → 22 → 17, with continuous reduction; the 2026 plan is 13 students, a further reduction of 4 students (about -23.5%) compared to 2025, a relatively large reduction, further intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Member of C9 League, 985/211/Double First-Class; Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking: 2021 11th → 2022 13th → 2023 13th → 2024 16th → 2025 14th → 2026 12th, stable in Top20 in recent years, with 2026 ranking rising to the highest in recent years; 2026 reputation evaluation neutral/mixed, no major negative public opinion; Douyin comprehensive heat total ranking 10th (high heat), large short video exposure, reflecting high application attention; in 2024, there was an abnormal signal in the admission line (related to insufficient enrollment promotion according to candidates), but the ranking continued to advance in 2025, and the abnormal impact has been absorbed; the fifth round of discipline evaluation has 17 A-class disciplines (A+: Mechanics, Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Environmental Science and Engineering; A: Instrument Science and Technology, Civil Engineering, Control Science and Engineering, Mathematics, Electrical Engineering, Management Science and Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering; A-: Information and Communication Engineering, Optical Engineering, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics, Architecture, Aerospace Science and Technology), with top engineering strength, strong attraction to candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other advantageous majors of HIT continue to have high social popularity; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Chongqing General College Entrance Examination is about 209,000, with Physics Category estimated at about 136,895 based on the recent proportion of about 65.5%, slightly lower than the 2025 Physics Category of 139,478; Harbin Institute of Technology is located in Heilongjiang Province, belonging to cross-province enrollment; Chongqing is not a local source province for the university, with no local preference factors; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Chongqing continues to shrink, with only 13 students in 2026, a small-scale enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous upward trend in historical rankings, the further reduction of the 2026 enrollment plan by about 23.5%, the university's Soft Science ranking rising to 12th with stable reputation, and high Douyin heat attention, it is expected that competition will further intensify in 2026, and the ranking will continue to advance. The predicted minimum ranking is about 372, with a range of 322–422.

- Engineering Experimental Class (Autonomous Intelligent Systems Academician Featured Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (HKU Excellence Class).

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 372, range 322–422. If ranking is within the range, it is recommended to focus on the Tier 2 Future Technology Top-notch Class as the main direction, and Tier 1 Top Class/Academician Featured Class can be attempted; if ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<322), focus on Tier 1 top majors; if ranking is close to the upper limit (>422), it is recommended to use Tier 3 Shenzhen Campus classes as a safety option. HIT only enrolls 13 students in Physics Category in 2026, competition is extremely fierce. Candidates are advised to fill in accurately based on their own ranking.
